---
title: "KSU Analytics Day Spring 2026"
---

## Project Overview

This project analyzes NCAA basketball data for the 2026 KSU Analytics Day competition.

## Full Notebook

```{embed}
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/charlestlane/ksu_analyticsday_spring2026/main/code/DATA4990.Bresko.Lane.Treangen.Analysis.ipynb
:execute: true
```
